'''jawono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reaccess|reaccess]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reaccess|reaccess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jawono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæweneth|jæweneth]] || [[word:jæwenej|jæwenej]] || [[word:jæwenesh|jæwenesh]] || [[word:jæwene|jæwene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jawowonoth|jawowonoth]] || [[word:jawowonoj|jawowonoj]] || [[word:jawowonosh|jawowonosh]] || [[word:jawowono|jawowono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jawonoth|jawonoth]] || [[word:jawonoj|jawonoj]] || [[word:jawonosh|jawonosh]] || [[word:jawono|jawono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jawofnoth|jawofnoth]] || [[word:jawofnoj|jawofnoj]] || [[word:jawofnosh|jawofnosh]] || [[word:jawofnof|jawofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jawonotho|jawonotho]] || [[word:jawonojo|jawonojo]] || [[word:jawonosho|jawonosho]] || [[word:jawonoko|jawonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jawonoth|jawonoth]] || [[word:jawonoj|jawonoj]] || [[word:jawonosh|jawonosh]] || [[word:jawono|jawono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jawonothol|jawonothol]] || [[word:jawonojol|jawonojol]] || [[word:jawonoshol|jawonoshol]] || [[word:jawonokol|jawonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jawonothotho|jawonothotho]] || [[word:jawonojojo|jawonojojo]] || [[word:jawonoshosho|jawonoshosho]] || [[word:jawonoko|jawonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jawonothon|jawonothon]] || [[word:jawonojon|jawonojon]] || [[word:jawonoshon|jawonoshon]] || [[word:jawonokon|jawonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jawonothoro|jawonothoro]] || [[word:jawonojoro|jawonojoro]] || [[word:jawonoshoro|jawonoshoro]] || [[word:jawonokoro|jawonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
